label: Getting started
description: How to consume agent-ui in your own app: the workspace packages and the one load-bearing CSS import order.

label: Theming
description: One theming subtree, three live axes: scheme (light/dark), scale, and density.

label: Token reference
description: Every colour role across every family, the numbered tonal primitives, plus the dimensional ramp.

label: Sizing & density
description: Control geometry is an explicit (scale x size) lookup, never a multiplier; density touches spacing only.

label: Forms
description: A form-provider coordinating three field-wrapped controls, one working example narrated concern by concern.

label: Which component when
description: A quick chooser between components that overlap in purpose, condensed from the A2UI catalog's own guidance.

label: Changelog
description: The shipping summary of agent-ui's milestones, newest-first.

label: App Shell
description: ui-app-shell is the application frame: a presence-driven grid of named landmark regions that reflows.

label: Master Detail
description: ui-master-detail is a docked list | detail arrangement over the shipped ui-split, drilling into one record.

label: Settings
description: ui-settings is a sections rail + panel, composing ui-master-detail for a schema-driven settings surface.

label: Router
description: @agent-ui/router: a memory-first SPA router whose route state lives in a kernel signal.

label: Highlight
description: @agent-ui/code/highlight: a swappable syntax-highlighter registry plus seven bundled, zero-dependency tokenizers.

label: Agent Admin
description: ui-agent-admin is a three-pane ui-split (chat canvas, prompts, settings) over ui-conversation and ui-settings, one shared SettingsStore, live-apply with no external model dependency.

label: Layout Primitives
description: The structural layout family — ui-row, ui-column, ui-list, ui-grid — sharing the UIContainerElement base and gap/align/justify props.

label: A2UI Canvas
description: A live A2UI payload rendering a real button through the shipped renderer, round-tripping its click as an action message.

label: A2UI Catalog
description: Every component the default agent-ui A2UI catalog declares, rendered live through the real renderer.

label: A2UI Dynamic List
description: A2UI v1.0's data-bound children: one ChildList template rendering one live element per array row.

label: A2UI Generative Form
description: One A2UI payload becomes a complete, validated, accessibly-labelled form, submitting a typed aggregate action.

label: A2UI Patterns
description: Five UIs an agent actually emits: a settings form, a destructive confirmation, a wizard, and more.

label: A2UI Gallery
description: Every composition on the A2UI example-seed shelf, rendered live through the same renderer.

label: A2UI Streaming
description: An agent streams a screen one JSONL line at a time; each line applies the moment it arrives.

label: A2UI Live Agent
description: A live-agent chat app: the agent's A2UI stream renders into a real canvas that round-trips actions as the next turn.

label: A2UI Chat
description: One scrolling chat log where the agent's narration streams live and its A2UI surfaces render inline, persisting across turns until closed.

label: A2UI Authoring Guide
description: How to author a catalog row and an example payload, the two things that teach an agent this fleet.

label: A2A Tic-Tac-Toe Arena
description: Two agents play tic-tac-toe through a deterministic referee, an isolation-proven Agent2Agent match.

label: A2A Concepts & Demos
description: The A2A corpus made readable: one card per admitted record, the wire shape it teaches, and why.

label: A2A Artifact Feed
description: A conversation carried over A2A, some turns bearing live A2UI artifacts.

label: Gallery
description: Every shipped component, browsable and filterable in one live grid.

label: Changelog
description: Every milestone as its own searchable record, loaded lazily as a separate per-entry index.

label: Decision Records
description: Every ratified ADR as its own searchable record, loaded lazily as a separate per-decision index.
